---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Image, Edge and corner detection"
image: social-cards/image-edge-corner.png
---

# 🏗️ Edge and corner detection {#sec-image-edge-corner}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Edge and corner detection
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
